exceptions.reason: The release workflow is one dependency-ordered packaging, signing, validation, and publication pipeline whose platform jobs share artifact contracts.
exceptions.splitCost: Extracting jobs without a proven responsibility seam would move coupling into reusable-workflow inputs and obscure permissions, conditions, and artifact provenance.
exceptions.reviewTrigger: Review when a packaging platform gains an independent release cadence or the workflow adds another separately invocable responsibility.

excludedFiles.reason: Cohesive operational packaging script with tightly coupled repository metadata rendering.
excludedFiles.splitCost: Separating renderers would duplicate or obscure the shared repository metadata and signing contract.
excludedFiles.reviewTrigger: Review when APT publishing or repository metadata responsibilities change.

excludedFiles.reason: Cohesive package-validation command whose parsers share one reporting and CLI contract.
excludedFiles.splitCost: Separating parsers would weaken the single validation-report contract without creating an independent responsibility.
excludedFiles.reviewTrigger: Review when validation gains another package format or separate invocation surface.
